title: Moderation update: high-severity reports handled
body: Today’s high-severity moderation queue has been reviewed and resolved. We permanently removed two accounts after validating severe violations: one for posting phishing links across multiple channels and one for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. We also closed one brigaded false-positive report with no action against the reported maintainer. Please continue reporting clear abuse in good faith; false reporting and brigading make real safety work harder.
